description: Beneath the waves and along the shore, where saltwater shapes every story.
locations: Coral Reef
Colors riot beneath the surface, alive and sharp-edged. The reef hums with movement and clicks with hidden claws.
Kelp Forest
Tall green fronds sway in the current like slow curtains. Light filters through in shifting columns, and shadows move between the stalks.
Sunken Shipwreck
A hull rests on its side in the murk, rigging trailing like dead vines. Fish dart through the shattered deck where something still glints below.
Deep-Sea Trench
The ocean floor drops away into blackness so complete it swallows light. Pressure builds with every fathom, and strange shapes pulse in the dark.
Sea Cave
Waves boom inside the dark mouth of stone. At low tide you can walk in. At high tide, whatever entered has nowhere to go.
Oyster Bed
Rough shells crowd the shallow bottom in bumpy rows. The water here is cloudy with silt, and pearls hide inside the quietest ones.
Volcanic Vent
Columns of shimmering heat twist upward from cracks in the ocean floor. The water tastes of iron and the stone is warm to the touch.
Sandy Seafloor
Fine white sand stretches in gentle ripples beneath clear water. Small creatures dart between shells, and the silence down here is vast.
Hidden Grotto
Water drips in steady echoes inside a chamber of smooth wet stone. Light enters from below, casting rippling blue across the ceiling.
Coral Castle
Towers and arches of living coral rise from the reef, shaped by decades of patient growth. Fish swim through the windows of rooms no one built.
Tidal Pool
A shallow basin of trapped seawater, alive with small bright creatures. Anemones pulse and crabs freeze mid-step.
Underwater Canyon
Sheer walls of rock plunge into blue darkness on either side. The current funnels through the gap, carrying everything with it.
Island Village
Brightly painted boats line a pebble beach below a cluster of wind-battered homes. The sea provides everything and takes what it pleases.
Lighthouse
A beam sweeps the dark water in a slow circle from the rocky shore. The keeper climbs the spiral stairs each evening.
Boathouse
Slick planks over dark water, sheltering a vessel or two. Oars lean against the walls and the hull knocks gently at its moorings.
Whirlpool
The water spirals with a low, hungry roar. Debris circles the rim before vanishing into a throat of black water.
Lagoon
Warm shallow water glows turquoise over white sand. The beauty is disarming, and beneath the surface the sand shifts in patterns.
Mangrove
Twisted roots rise from brackish water, forming a tangled maze at the waterline. The mud sucks at your boots and the insects never stop.
Floating Market
Boats bump gently together, laden with fruit and fish and bright cloth. Voices haggle across the water, and coins pass from hand to hand over the rails.
Abyss
The edge of the world, straight down. Darkness so deep it feels alive. Stones thrown over the edge never make a sound.
Pearl Farm
Ropes of shells hang in rows beneath the surface, tended by divers who know each one. The water is warm and clear, and the harvest takes patience.
Fishing Village
Nets hang drying between salt-bleached cottages. The tide dictates everything here, and the catch determines whether the season is kind.
Sunken City
Rooftops and broken towers emerge from the green murk. Streets of pale stone vanish into deeper water where faint lights still flicker.
Sunken Temple
Carved pillars rise from the silt, still holding a roof crusted with barnacles. The altar inside is clean, as though something still tends it.
Ship Graveyard
Broken hulls crowd the shallows, heaped and rotting. The tide groans through their ribs. Gulls circle but never land.
Seamount
The ocean floor rises sharply here into a flat-topped peak. Currents swirl with unusual force, and the water above teems with life.
Fjord
Sheer cliff walls plunge straight into black water on both sides. The passage is narrow and the echoes carry for miles.
Cenote
A round hole in the limestone opens to reveal blue water far below. Vines trail down the walls. The ancient stains suggest this place once had a purpose.
Brine Pool
A pocket of water denser than the sea around it sits on the ocean floor like a lake within a lake. Its edges shimmer.
Coral Garden
Soft corals wave in the gentle current like an underwater meadow. Colors bloom in every direction, and tiny fish dart between the branches.
Estuary
Salt and fresh water mingle in a wide, brackish stretch. The banks are soft and treacherous. Herons stand motionless, watching the murk.
Delta
The river breaks into a hundred slow fingers, spreading across flat land choked with reeds. Channels shift with every flood.
Frozen Sea
Ice stretches from shore to horizon, groaning and cracking under its own weight. The cold is absolute and the silence almost perfect.
Glacier
A river of ancient ice creeps forward, blue-white and groaning. Crevasses split its surface, and meltwater runs in channels carved by centuries.
